competitors.title: Buzbug LED Bug Zapper Indoor, 50000 H Long-Lasting LED, Energy Saving & Dual Band Attraction, High-Voltage Electric Mosquito Zapper, Fly Trap Mosquito Trap, Fly Killer -MA015B
bullets: Upgraded Dual-Band Attraction: Unlike traditional single-band fly traps, the Buzbug LED bug zapper utilizes dual-color LEDs (365nm + 395nm) engineered to target a broader insect spectrum. This dual-wavelength LED system expands the range, attracting 30% more species of flying insects (such as mosquitoes, flies, and moths), especially effective in low-light or nocturnal environments.

Long-Lasting & Cost Saving: Stop wasting money on frequent bulb replacements. Our high-efficiency LED tubes boast an exceptional lifespan of 25,000 to 50,000 hours—far outlasting standard glass fluorescent tubes. Buzbug fly killer provides a long-lasting solution that saves maintenance time and costs. (Bulbs are replaceable.)

High-Voltage & Wide Coverage: Equipped with a robust internal electric grid, this mosquito zapper delivers an instant kill upon contact. With a massive coverage area of up to 2,100 sq. ft., it is perfect for large living rooms, kitchens, dining areas, and balconies.

EPA Registered & Safety Protection: A dense outer protective grill prevents accidental contact with the internal grid, protecting children and pets. This electric fly trap provides physical bug control without odors or smoke and is fully registered with the U.S. EPA for compliance.

Modern Design with Portable Handle: Featuring a clean square profile and modern aesthetics, this mosquito zapper blends easily with home decor. The PU leather handle supports convenient hanging or repositioning.

One-Pull Tray & Easy Cleaning: Cleaning is a breeze with the slide-out, washable insect collection tray. Simply pull the tray to dispose of debris without touching the insects. We’ve also included a specialized cleaning brush for the internal grid. (Note: Always unplug the device before maintenance.)

Reliable Warranty & Usage Tips: The Buzbug bug zapper comes with a one-year warranty. A 2-year warranty covers the LED lamp tube. Pro Tip: Placing scented baits—such as sugar or fruit peels—in the bottom tray can enhance performance.
competitors.description: 3 LED Lamps, Energy-Efficient & 10x Longer Lifespan: Our bug zapper includes three 4W LED bulbs that use 40% less energy and last ten years, longer than traditional bulbs. Note: The LED tube may detach during transit due to abnormal handling, rest assured it's easy to reattach. Open the outer protective grid using a screwdriver or similar metal objects. Then, reattach the fallen tube. (Ensure the bug zapper is powered off before performing this operation.)

competitors.title: Buzbug LED Bug Zapper Indoor Outdoor, Up to 50000 Hrs Lifespan Lamps, Energy Saving & Dual Band Attraction, 1.7 m Power Cord, High Voltage Mosquito Fly Zapper Trap Killer -MO008C
bullets: Upgraded Dual-Band Attraction: Unlike traditional single-band fly traps, the Buzbug LED bug zapper utilizes dual-color LEDs (365nm + 395nm) engineered to target a broader insect spectrum. This dual-wavelength LED system expands the range, attracting 30% more species of flying insects (such as mosquitoes, flies, and moths), especially effective in low-light or nocturnal environments.

High-Voltage Instant Electric Shock: Experience enhanced efficiency with our upgraded electric grid, capable of delivering a powerful electric shock in just 0.01 seconds. This rapid action eliminates a variety of insects, including mosquitoes, flies, moths, fruit flies, and culex.

Long-Lasting & Cost-Saving: No need for frequent bulb replacements. The durable UV-LED tubes feature a 25,000~50,000 hours lifespan—10 times longer than traditional glass tubes—providing a long-lasting solution that saves maintenance time and costs. (Bulbs are replaceable.)

Wide Coverage for Outdoor & Indoor: Including a 1.7 m cord, it can protect up to 1/2 acre for outdoor or 2,100 sq. ft. area for indoor, which makes the insect killer ideal for outdoor and indoor use. Great for gardens, backyards, patios, balconies, garages, and homes.

EPA Registered Safe & User-Friendly Design: This outdoor mosquito killer has a safe and dense, sturdy carbon steel protective grid. It is equipped with a dead insect collection tray at the bottom and a cleaning brush for user convenience. This electric bug zapper is U.S. EPA registered for compliance and reliability.

Reliable Warranty Statement: The Buzbug bug zapper comes with a one-year warranty. A 2-year warranty covers the LED lamp tube. The Buzbug LED fly zapper is designed for long-lasting performance. If the mosquito killer fails within this period, you can get a replacement through Buzbug's warranty service.

Durable & Sustainable: At Buzbug, we design products that combine long-lasting performance with energy efficiency, reducing power consumption without compromising performance. Additionally, with every purchase, we actively support carbon offset projects and reforestation initiatives, helping to ensure a green and sustainable future for everyone.
competitors.description:
Do you still have bug bites this summer?

Buzbug Bug Zapper can assist you in regaining your stylish and peaceful environment.

Buzbug Bug Zapper is meant to attract flying insects and electrocute them instantaneously using a high-voltage internal grid.

The Buzbug Bug Zapper can be used both indoors and outdoors. A great tool for any family who wants to maintain their home free of flies and other insects without having to spend time and effort on it every day.

Updated UV-LED Lamp Beads: 

Buzbug has upgraded the lamp tube for the bug zapper, using a lamp tube of 60 innovative UV-LED mosquito lamp beads. The surface of the tube might imitate the body's temperature if the temperature is kept between 36 and 37 degrees. UV-LED lamp beads can be used to efficiently release the mosquito's preferred wavelength. Only a mild light, which is not only safe for human health but also effective in lowering light pollution and conserving energy, is emitted by the lamp beads. It's crucial to keep in mind that mosquitoes are drawn to ultraviolet light rather than visible light. Therefore, increasing the brightness of the mosquito lamp is not rec

SAFE -- The top and bottom layers of the fly swatter are safety nets, which not only protect the fly zapper from damage, but also prevent electric shock during use. USB CHARGING AND LARGE MESH SURFACE -- This mosquito swatter is equipped with a built-in 1800 mAh battery and a charging base, plug and charge. It can be used continuously for a long time after being fully charged. The grid area is 22*16 cm, and the three layers of grids are staggered and intersected. The mesh size is about 15 mm. The size of flies and mosquitoes is about 3-10 mm, so mosquitoes have nowhere to escape after touching the grid area.

INTELLIGENT MOSQUITO KILLER -- Built-in Purple LED light, push the power switch of the electric mosquito swatter to the ON2 position, and then place it in the charging base to act as a mosquito killer lamp. Once mosquitoes and other flying insects are attracted by the purple light and touch the electric mosquito swatter , It will be killed on the spot.

LIGHT AND HANDY -- Our electric fly swatter is made of environmentally friendly ABS material, which is drop-resistant and portable, light in weight and feels good in your hand. It is absolutely ideal for home travel, fishing, camping or barbecue.
